commands: Reevaluate the choice of a dependency parser, considering that it may not fully capture the nuances of all contemporary linguistic theories, particularly those that emphasize phrase structure grammar.
Provide a more nuanced analysis of the time complexity, especially for complex sentence structures, and consider alternative parsing strategies that might offer better performance.
Expand on the training and validation process of the neural network model, including details on the dataset used, the architecture of the model, and the metrics for validation.
Broaden the selection of sample sentences to include a wider variety of imperative and interrogative forms, ensuring that edge cases are adequately represented.
